channel.title: Cybersecurity on Ahmed Boureghida
channel.description: Recent content in Cybersecurity on Ahmed Boureghida

item.title: TryHackMe Room: Pickle Rick Writeup
item.description: TryHackMe Room: Pickle Rick Link to heading Description: A Rick and Morty themed CTF where the objective is to help turn Rick back into a human! Difficulty: Easy Link: Pickle Rick Room 1. Enumeration with Nmap Link to heading We initiate a comprehensive scan of the target machine using Nmap to identify available services and potential vulnerabilities: sudo nmap -sS -sV -A -sC --script=vuln -T5 10.10.225.125 The scan reveals two open ports:

item.title: OSCP Course Privilege Escalation Notes
item.description: Information Gathering: Link to heading Manual Enumeration (User Information): Link to heading Windows: Link to heading whoami net user (list all users) net user [username] (get user info) Linux: Link to heading whoami cat /etc/passwd id Hostname Enumeration: Link to heading Common Commands: Link to heading Windows: hostname or systeminfo Linux: uname -a or cat /etc/issue List Services and Processes: Link to heading Windows: tasklist /SVC Linux: ps aux Network Enumeration: Link to heading IP Address: Link to heading Windows: ipconfig Linux: ifconfig Network Routes: Link to heading Windows: route print Linux: arp -a Network Connections: Link to heading Windows: netstat -ano Linux: ss -anp Firewall Enumeration: Link to heading Windows: Link to heading netsh advfirewall show currentprofile netsh advfirewall firewall show rule name=all Scheduled Tasks Enumeration: Link to heading Linux: Link to heading ls -lah /etc/cron* Windows: Link to heading schtasks /query /fo LIST /v Enumeration of Applications: Link to heading Linux: Link to heading dpkg -l or dpkg -l | grep ^ii (installed packages) lsmod (loaded kernel modules) Windows: Link to heading wmic product get name, version, vendor (installed software) wmic qfe get Caption, Description, HotFixID, InstalledOn (installed updates) Enumeration of Readable/Writable Files and Directories: Link to heading Windows: Link to heading Get-ChildItem "C:\Program Files" -Recurse | Get-Acl | Where-Object { $_.
